name: prepare_document_tools
description: Check or prepare the local Python-backed document tools used by the Office skills. Use this before DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, or PDF creation/editing when dependencies may be missing. The prepare action creates or updates the app-managed Python environment and installs required Python packages. Ask the user before setting include_optional_tools=true because that may download or install LibreOffice/Poppler.

action.description: Use check to report current readiness. Use prepare to install or update required document-tool dependencies.

include_optional_tools.description: When true, also prepare optional LibreOffice/Poppler helpers for Office-to-PDF conversion, rendering QA, and spreadsheet recalculation. Ask the user before enabling this.
